chokri: Pu züpo kübalü thüma hu Synagogue küzhoo celüno vori die sü, n nupü sate; dipühla kümüthao po kümüzhe la züta, zita.
english: While he was still speaking, they came from the synagogue ruler's house saying, "Your daughter is dead. Why bother the Teacher any more?"

chokri: Neko sopü apü kephomami le ziti poyi ve? Mhace I ketho po lize neko dipüla amelü mota?
english: Which of you convicts me of sin? If I tell the truth, why do you not believe me?

chokri: Neko nyhibü shühyeko, neko vemo zo die, dibi die mhaküve poyi ta? Kükrenamoli mha pulü chupü küba bi die pu talü po pariyo tina.
english: You offspring of vipers, how can you, being evil, speak good things? For out of the abundance of the heart, the mouth speaks.

chokri: Süsa uko püce poti, n Po dipüce ba? Jisu pola kesü, neko asemo mu a Po sheri semo; neko ase süze a Po sheri sete vele.
english: They said therefore to him, "Where is your Father?" Jesus answered, "You know neither me, nor my Father. If you knew me, you would know my Father also."

chokri: Ha züh müdoküphilü vo hite, eli küsüo belü ha küla süte. Kükrenamoli, Küde, kuku mo Zapozale sü tülhülü nzüzo tina.
english: Bring us not into temptation, but deliver us from the evil one. For yours is the Kingdom, the power, and the glory forever. Amen.'

chokri: Neko thezho kekhikoyo kesukerho, neko mhase cabi khipü tate, neko sheri thiyomo mu mipori süko zümu.
english: Woe to you lawyers! For you took away the key of knowledge. You didn't enter in yourselves, and those who were entering in, you hindered."

chokri: Kekrelamori Jihova püco kethoo zori jüchuva khrü moze menuyi kemosa nkelakre mode sübi tari seho.
english: for if God didn't spare the natural branches, neither will he spare you.

chokri: Pue küsako Poo mori kürhühko Po zo, mu nekoe kukri müzho shüh tayo zo.
english: He is not the God of the dead, but of the living. You are therefore badly mistaken."

chokri: Kekrelamori thevo kerekrüo thüma dolü keda mekre pü Jihova mhatho kethila rütho mu kephoma reshü kha kesüko thümala thisü yo.
english: For every high priest, being taken from among men, is appointed for men in things pertaining to God, that he may offer both gifts and sacrifices for sins.

chokri: Mhace neko süo seyi lize nenü yite, nekola keve zoho.
english: If you know these things, blessed are you if you do them.

chokri: Hako tapra tso keyisa sekeyi cejü rethi tsokemo süo Malta le ziti seyi.
english: When we had escaped, then they learned that the island was called Malta.

chokri: Pü ngoyo kemo Jihova hü thipü, khonuko nurao.
english: who is the image of the invisible God, the firstborn of all creation.

chokri: N küphomako va n prü vaho; zi küti küpo mo sü die tayite, zi küti küpo nyi dipüh-o po rüyikuta
english: For which is easier, to say, 'Your sins are forgiven;' or to say, 'Get up, and walk?'

chokri: Thyatira kehulü keba tüyochoyi cetho kesü: Jihova Nu hiko po sü, pü mhüni meli bi, püphezi ni pitol kemeva bi;
english: "To the angel of the assembly in Thyatira write: "The Son of God, who has his eyes like a flame of fire, and his feet are like burnished brass, says these things:

chokri: litho
english: sing

chokri: Sücesü thoküprü pühngu ngoküyio pu thoküprü kükre pühngu sa püh vori die sü; Nyepoo no thoküprü pühngu püh a prü süe, mo Yhie! I kükre pühngu sa mve yi ve; zisü.
english: He who received the five talents came and brought another five talents, saying, 'Lord, you delivered to me five talents. Behold, I have gained another five talents besides them.'

chokri: Sücesü mi küna yilü tato, mipüh khiyi tato, mo kükreo kha vato.
english: Then two men will be in the field: one will be taken and one will be left;

chokri: Süosü, thenomipü tehe sü kechu pü metsü pü merhalü meta, metü cüsüri kemothe.
english: It is like yeast, which a woman took and hid in three measures of flour, until it was all leavened."

chokri: Süla kümüjo chothoo zori u thürho nyie tsüsa, kümatho yithoo sücie thürho nyie küchüh moto me?
english: For if the service of condemnation has glory, the service of righteousness exceeds much more in glory.

chokri: Kükrelamole küthoo lüzhie uthi püh ulü küde khi külaküyi cholü voyiyo mu süla uro tayo mo, vele ciedzüo lüzhie no küsa püh voyo.
english: For godly sorrow works repentance to salvation, which brings no regret. But the sorrow of the world works death.

chokri: Süla upüzüde pükesalü ukhrüve, Khrista kesalü rhüla sü püpo zapozale thisü, sübide uri kehükesalü ta keyi mesü.
english: We were buried therefore with him through baptism to death, that just like Christ was raised from the dead through the glory of the Father, so we also might walk in newness of life.

chokri: Süla uko udolü kepo de uko cekhro va hi khe, vele khüle heve hesu pe khe; sopüza thito sheri, thopü kemeta ketho lesi jüko tsüyi ketola: “uko afüneko khipü kezayi mu a bola pü khüle (hevehesu) thide khiyi.” Hiko thipaheko thisü.
english: Then they said to one another, "Let's not tear it, but cast lots for it to decide whose it will be," that the Scripture might be fulfilled, which says, "They parted my garments among them. For my cloak they cast lots." Therefore the soldiers did these things.

chokri: Pü pokesü, I thejo kha n yo sü ketho zoto, mu thimekro kesü n mehü mekro süto.
english: saying, "Most surely I will bless you, and I will surely multiply you."

chokri: No vo küto ce I thadzü akhü pü Troa lü Karpo belü sü küvao mu lüsidako bahuzori lüsi chüko müku no pü vote.
english: Bring the cloak that I left at Troas with Carpus when you come, and the books, especially the parchments.

chokri: Abe lu apple dizhu ba?
english: How many apples are there in my hand?

chokri: Mülüyi mülüküyiko yo zasi hiko tato; Puko aza lü thürüküsuko huyi to, uko khü küsa süh mha poto,
english: These signs will accompany those who believe: in my name they will cast out demons; they will speak with new languages;

chokri: I lüsi tho küsüo nieko lü thi müzhie va zori alütsakhu tamo, vele alümüzhie ri tazo: süo pütü dopüh la zoleri nieko lü thimüshü ta tsüla.
english: For though I made you sorry with my letter, I do not regret it, though I did regret it. For I see that my letter made you sorry, though just for a while.

chokri: Ne khapüh Jihova tsüyi. Thürüküshü müsüh thiyi. Sileo pü ne thürhü tato,
english: Be subject therefore to God. But resist the devil, and he will flee from you.

chokri: Pü Nuo melü keyimi kechothe kehü ngo yite, somi Nuo melü mota sheri kehü ngo yi ho, vele Jihova lekhu püyo ba tayo.
english: One who believes in the Son has eternal life, but one who disobeys the Son won't see life, but the wrath of God remains on him."

chokri: Vele akehüju thüma celü vorimo, vele I hiko po kesü nekopo kelakeyi ngoyi ketola.
english: But the testimony which I receive is not from man. However, I say these things that you may be saved.

chokri: Dipühna n sadzikoe thazü pethimi zhoko varhüyo la? Kükrenamoli, puko mhaküti mhüzü u be miltüyo mo tina; zita.
english: "Why do your disciples disobey the tradition of the elders? For they don't wash their hands when they eat bread."

chokri: Süsa Herod sata mütha, Yhie, Nyepoo shoyimi püh Egypt lüno Joseph mholü puce vori die pu yisü;
english: But when Herod was dead, behold, an angel of the Lord appeared in a dream to Joseph in Egypt, saying,

chokri: Kehopüri mhace uni kebami po reni yite.
english: If anyone has an ear, let him hear.

chokri: Tüyo rako rele lüsüte, uko tsava mori rüri yomo; uko tühace mori kengu ketice ri bamo, Jihova süko va thori thiyo, (ntheküyo) neko sükoce veku mome, türakoce?
english: Consider the ravens: they don't sow, they don't reap, they have no warehouse or barn, and God feeds them. How much more valuable are you than birds!

chokri: Kekrelamori thümala kesa vorita, mu kesalü rhüla keyi sheri vorita.
english: For since death came by man, the resurrection of the dead also came by man.

chokri: Süsa Ananias püfü kelasü, Niepoo I thüma kekro celü thüma hio ju seti pü Jerusalem lü kemesakoyo mhakesüshu thipü süti se;
english: But Ananias answered, "Lord, I have heard from many about this man, how much evil he did to your saints at Jerusalem.

chokri: I mütümügü kütsü do ri she, mu I münyhümünyhü kütsü do ri she; mha kühopü lüri u kühi küthi mu müri kütsü, küthüvü mu kümüzhie kütsü do ri she.
english: I know how to be humbled, and I know also how to abound. In everything and in all things I have learned the secret both to be filled and to be hungry, both to abound and to be in need.

chokri: Thüma krode püh pusa müdzita, süzomoli Judea lü mu Jerusalem lü, mu Idumaea lüno mu Jordan cu küvo cori mu Tyre mu Sidon kümütu mütü lü makroe Pu dipüh thi sü shi küti se sü die ta Puce vori.
english: from Jerusalem, from Idumaea, beyond the Jordan, and those from around Tyre and Sidon. A great multitude, hearing what great things he did, came to him.

chokri: I lesithopü neko tsü kesülü nekopo kerezhü miko zü kemekro hino süzo.
english: I wrote to you in my letter to have no company with sexual sinners;

chokri: Süna neko ri bayite; Mhakükrenamoli, neko lüba kümo bavüdo pühlü thümanuo vori zoto tina. Küzütho mo kürüzü ceta
english: Therefore also be ready, for in an hour that you don't expect, the Son of Man will come.

chokri: A züneko, zale küthi Nepo Jisu mülüyi küta bi humiyo unü shekreta hite
english: My brothers, don't hold the faith of our Lord Jesus Christ of glory with partiality.

chokri: Uni mhüko khrisü, uni püseyi ta; mu pü uni mhüjülü ngo mota.
english: Their eyes were opened, and they recognized him, and he vanished out of their sight.

chokri: Jihova kesami zori phü merhüsü yive ziti kelü, pü sülü pühüpü ngoyi tazo.
english: accounting that God is able to raise up even from the dead. Figuratively speaking, he also did receive him back from the dead.

chokri: Nekelü kemhade kekhrü pühkhrü, kelürhüh de lüpüh thiyi yo a kenüo neyo tsühyito.
english: make my joy full, by being like-minded, having the same love, being of one accord, of one mind;

chokri: Ha müthimünyi, vele ha khava mo; hatsahavü, vele ha müka vamo;
english: pursued, yet not forsaken; struck down, yet not destroyed;

chokri: Sübi uko cüyi ketakori, Judahmi lebimo vele u Judah kemokori samo tome?
english: us, whom he also called, not from the Jews only, but also from the Gentiles?

chokri: Kükhrü a züneko, rünisüte, Jihova cejü hilü küdimiko küdapüh kümülü ceco mhakünemi mu pü khrüyo kütsümi la dzüphra thisü küva küde rüve kasükalü thita
english: Listen, my beloved brothers. Didn't God choose those who are poor in this world to be rich in faith, and heirs of the Kingdom which he promised to those who love him?

chokri: Kemesa Rüpülü uni ketsü kesüsa uni ta Seleucia lüvo de rutho khi Cyprus lü vota.
english: So, being sent out by the Holy Spirit, they went down to Seleucia. From there they sailed to Cyprus.

chokri: N moyo zatho kehopüri pü mezikemo thi kephomalü vota hite, vele kesalü rhüla kesü kehüpü hüte Therüola, nmo zathoko khi kemezilü Jihova mhanyo thite.
english: Neither present your members to sin as instruments of unrighteousness, but present yourselves to God, as alive from the dead, and your members as instruments of righteousness to God.

chokri: Hicehi mhaseba, mhaseyi kevemi khonu mhaphri seyite, süsü thüma mhaphri, mu pu No lize 666.
english: Here is wisdom. He who has understanding, let him calculate the number of the beast, for it is the number of a man. His number is six hundred sixty-six.

chokri: A yo kejothikemomi thejo kepütho.
english: Blessed is he who is not offended by me."

chokri: Kemesa Rüpü puce mese kesü, Niepoo Khrista kengo mhüjü püpo sata hole zi tayo.
english: It had been revealed to him by the Holy Spirit that he should not see death before he had seen the Lord's Christ.

chokri: Mu püh tü püh vori küyi, süosü Herod-e pu kümünu tüso nha pu khro mhaküseko, riwhümi küzhoko mu Galileemi mülhiko la tülhü püh küsüh sü.
english: Then a convenient day came, that Herod on his birthday made a supper for his nobles, the high officers, and the chief men of Galilee.

chokri: Püpü kegü düva, süce Pharoah nupü pü püvo pünu thide theküyi.
english: When he was thrown out, Pharaoh's daughter took him up, and reared him as her own son.

chokri: Jews miko kekro tavori, pü süce kebala, Jisu lebi la zo mori, Lazarus sheri pe ketola Jisu pü sa ketalü phü merhü kesüla.
english: A large crowd therefore of the Jews learned that he was there, and they came, not for Jesus' sake only, but that they might see Lazarus also, whom he had raised from the dead.

chokri: Uko choyi kethi rüpüko ketsüpü kelakeyi yitholü kalü kethiko thisü mome?
english: Aren't they all ministering spirits, sent out to do service for the sake of those who will inherit salvation?

chokri: Teko kefüko salatata, Niepoo po kemele mu püchu, mhahiko metü se mu ngo keyila ukoce po kesübi.
english: The shepherds returned, glorifying and praising God for all the things that they had heard and seen, just as it was told them.

chokri: Hako hunehu zü kekho ketasa hako ru lü lüta, mu uko ta uko celü vota.
english: After saying goodbye to each other, we went on board the ship, and they returned home again.

chokri: Eli müthaküyikoe Pü züyono ta vori küzü ngo die müprüh shüh die sü, Rüpü püh tazo sidie u müprüh pü se zota.
english: When the disciples saw him walking on the sea, they were troubled, saying, "It's a ghost!" and they cried out for fear.

chokri: Uko püfü kelakesü, dipü bi sheri semo, sita.
english: They answered that they didn't know where it was from.

chokri: Vee thüma kürüzhü mu mi swü she küzhomi miswü mu miri uswü sino shü mamatato.
english: But evil men and impostors will grow worse and worse, deceiving and being deceived.

chokri: Vele pü uko zü kekhota sürho bate side, ukoce poti, thenye hio I Jerusalem lü ba moze su; vele I sala tavorito nekoce, mhace Jihova medo lize. Süsa pü Ephesus lü ru thopü tata.
english: but taking his leave of them, and saying, "I must by all means keep this coming feast in Jerusalem, but I will return again to you if God wills," he set sail from Ephesus.

chokri: Tsühi mhace Timothy vori lize, püpo methi mpe hide neko zübata te; kekrelamori pü sheri amhatho bi mhathi tazo tila.
english: Now if Timothy comes, see that he is with you without fear, for he does the work of the Lord, as I also do.

chokri: Kemesako mu Khrista kemelü lü keta sazüjürakohi Colossae lü kebako ce kesü, ngokemezhe po neko züba keyi thite, Jihova ukopo mu uko Niepoo Jisu Khrista celü kevori.
english: to the saints and faithful brothers in Christ at Colossae: Grace to you and peace from God our Father, and the Lord Jesus Christ.

chokri: Jüo po uthi meve vori, pü udolü hü, hako püngo, zapozale Poo nu püyo ngokemezhe mu kethopo chupü.
english: The Word became flesh, and lived among us. We saw his glory, such glory as of the one and only Son of the Father, full of grace and truth.

chokri: Süze puko ta Jerusalem lü vori. Mu Jisu kürüsücelü lü die mi kürüsucelü mha zhüh mu mha khri kübako püh kügü süta. Süze Pue mi rüka küle küba miz mu thürüvünu zhüh kübako phula va.
english: They came to Jerusalem, and Jesus entered into the temple, and began to throw out those who sold and those who bought in the temple, and overthrew the tables of the money-changers, and the seats of those who sold the doves.

chokri: Süla Jisu püce po kesü, neko zasi mu ungo mhathoko ngozo kemosa melü yomo,
english: Jesus therefore said to him, "Unless you see signs and wonders, you will in no way believe."

chokri: Kekrelamori uko ce jüyikeve zhopo uko thisüve, uko ce po kesü bi; vele zhopo uko la meveyi mote, kemelü khipü reni keyi meveyi mo ketala kemelü khi renyi mote.
english: For indeed we have had good news preached to us, even as they also did, but the word they heard didn't profit them, because it wasn't mixed with faith by those who heard.

chokri: Mu hezo krade müzüh hi, sülü küyekütsü küba na; veli Ropü püh uküswu thiyi.
english: Don't be drunken with wine, in which is dissipation, but be filled with the Spirit,

chokri: Publius po mhathi shu mu thüza bü de püzilü zü, Paul pücelü de kecho thisü, pübe chopü püyosü, side püthi kesürho sü.
english: It happened that the father of Publius lay sick of fever and dysentery. Paul entered in to him, prayed, and laying his hands on him, healed him.

chokri: Pü yolü ce photü kükhü kürüh pü Nyepoo na kümüsa rüsuce pühthiyi.
english: in whom the whole building, fitted together, grows into a holy temple in the Lord;

chokri: Jisu püce pode, Tavo nnopu cüpü hice vorite.
english: Jesus said to her, "Go, call your husband, and come here."

chokri: Süsa Jisu semeto sü, poti Apo arüpü khapü nbelü süva züho; süo po kesüsa pü süshü ha thüla thita.
english: Jesus, crying with a loud voice, said, "Father, into your hands I commit my spirit!" Having said this, he breathed his last.

chokri: Vele thejücelü kezhoko tavori tice thejücelü uko phu medita, uko bamote side pota.
english: But the officers who came didn't find them in the prison. They returned and reported,

chokri: Ukoe Jisu fü küla de poti hako poyi sute Jisu pola küsü I ri dipü küku pü mha hiko thiyo sheri poho sita
english: They answered Jesus, "We don't know." Jesus said to them, "Neither do I tell you by what authority I do these things."

chokri: Niepoo jü keyepü sükhü sümhü metüko süva.
english: The Lord's word was spread abroad throughout all the region.

chokri: Süsa thüma krooe sü; Hiohi Galilee lü küba Nazareth lüno küvori sadzühküseo Jisu zo, zita.
english: The multitudes said, "This is the prophet, Jesus, from Nazareth of Galilee."

chokri: Mu cejüo mu sülü münyiko ditazü, Sirei thüma kühopührei Jihova nü thiyoküzhomi küchothe bayo.
english: The world is passing away with its lusts, but he who does God's will remains forever.

chokri: Sidie süko. Püce, püko po pü khüphre zori nyisü no die shota; mo süo zori nyi küyi khüko sührhoyita.
english: and they begged him that they might just touch the fringe of his garment. As many as touched it were made whole.

chokri: Vele süculü zhokezüko yirümode thezholü mezi ta yolizo uko neyikerüko vajo ketako mejo zoto.
english: Won't the uncircumcision which is by nature, if it fulfills the law, judge you, who with the letter and circumcision are a transgressor of the law?

chokri: Pütü sülü Moses menuyi, züve rizo, tekhri sü püpo celü theküba.
english: At that time Moses was born, and was exceedingly handsome. He was nourished three months in his father's house.

chokri: Anania, thevo kezho-opükhüce kebakoce po, püta vüsüno posü.
english: The high priest, Ananias, commanded those who stood by him to strike him on the mouth.

chokri: Süri puko ume ba kümo la dopüh libi güyi yo, sidie künuco züoe kümüzhe küti mu kümüthi kümünyi süri küyice; pukoe unümo mhatayo.
english: They have no root in themselves, but are short-lived. When oppression or persecution arises because of the word, immediately they stumble.

chokri: Süsa Joseph thümoo pühyi die linen khü kümüsa pühlü küzüyi die;
english: Joseph took the body, and wrapped it in a clean linen cloth,

chokri: Menu kesalayi keta, kecekere si mori cemu reta keho se, Jihova jülü, kechothe rhü bayo.
english: having been born again, not of corruptible seed, but of incorruptible, through the word of God, which lives and remains forever.

chokri: Jisu thono jülopü mitsümo vele püsajiko thozo.
english: (although Jesus himself didn't baptize, but his disciples),

chokri: Neko akhrethoko, mhace neko akepoko thi mu züyi lize.
english: You are my friends, if you do whatever I command you.

chokri: Thüma thsü methi shüsü, kethi hio pi keku keba Jihova zho shüta; uko lü kede mode zapo zale pü Jihova tsü mota.
english: People were scorched with great heat, and people blasphemed the name of God who has the power over these plagues. They didn't repent and give him glory.

chokri: Azüneko, usüla Jisu za khipü thepu de kemesatho thethilü talü yo.
english: Having therefore, brothers, boldness to enter into the holy place by the blood of Jesus,

chokri: Süla n melü kerede yite, neko kedipü püpo to sheri lü medo hite.
english: Settle it therefore in your hearts not to meditate beforehand how to answer,

chokri: Kekrelamori kemejo sü therüo celü vori moze kesula, mu mhace ukoyo süo shudü to lize pütü thelalü Jihova jüyikeve züyo kemo koyo dipü bizo toshi?
english: For the time has come for judgment to begin at the house of God. If it begins first with us, what will happen to those who don't obey the Gospel of God?

chokri: Kekrelamori kekri keba ngoyi ketala, püpo kesü, “hihe, pü tüpü vori züho, Niepoo posü I jükho kesapü Isreal cekro züde kefükho tato, mu Judah cekro sheri.
english: For finding fault with them, he said, "Behold, the days come," says the Lord, "That I will make a new covenant with the house of Israel and with the house of Judah;

chokri: Vele kehopü sheri tüzülü ta lize, püphe meshü yito, kekrelamori keve püyo ta kemola.
english: But if a man walks in the night, he stumbles, because the light isn't in him."

chokri: Thüma hiko uta püh a müno voriyo, mo püko ta püh a rhoyo; eli püko lüno a züh kümücuh shüh tayo.
english: 'These people draw near to me with their mouth, And honor me with their lips; But their heart is far from me.

chokri: Thümapü Jihova pü ketsüsü, püza John.
english: There came a man, sent from God, whose name was John.

chokri: Anu Timothy Ino kümüthazü hihi sadzü popüh kümütayo npo müdziyi mu nkunhie thide kümürha non poyo.
english: This charge I commit to you, my child Timothy, according to the prophecies which led the way to you, that by them you may wage the good warfare;

chokri: Shozuco no thüma lü lütiko pühri thüma va mürho vayomo, eli mha pu lüno küprariko sükosü thüma va mürho vayo.
english: There is nothing from outside of the man, that going into him can defile him; but the things which proceed out of the man are those that defile the man.

chokri: Uko ketsüpü Stephen zhe, Pü kecho thide, “Niepo Jisu arüpü püyi tate.”
english: They stoned Stephen as he called out, saying, "Lord Jesus, receive my Spirit!"

chokri: Pü ukoce poti, Caesar zhüko kha Caesar tsüvate, mu Jihova zhüko kha Jihova tsü vate.
english: He said to them, "Then give to Caesar the things that are Caesar's, and to God the things that are God's."

chokri: Jisu sü püce, No vezhosüyi nyi lize vo die n mha n züko zhüh püh küdimiko prü vate, sülize noe tüyo n cene neyi tato, sidie vori a sa müdzi tate, zita.
english: Jesus said to him, "If you want to be perfect, go, sell what you have, and give to the poor, and you will have treasure in heaven; and come, follow me."

chokri: Vele Jews melükemoko Gentiles kemelüko lü thimesu püsü usazüjürako metsusüta.
english: But the disbelieving Jews stirred up and embittered the souls of the Gentiles against the brothers.

chokri: Uko püzüyi muta, kekrelamori pü Jerusalem lü kho ketola.
english: They didn't receive him, because he was traveling with his face set towards Jerusalem.

chokri: Vele pü kemele ukhü metülü vo keye süta; makro tavo püfürenita, uko kethathiko thi kesürho sü ketola.
english: But the report concerning him spread much more, and great multitudes came together to hear, and to be healed by him of their infirmities.

chokri: Süsü bi die neko mha hikohi ngo küyice, pu tü müno te, cekhace thate; zi küti seyite.
english: Even so you also, when you see all these things, know that it is near, even at the doors.

chokri: Mu külaküyi püh ne pirüh thiyi mu ropü zecho süo u Jihova dzüo khi pühyi.
english: And take the helmet of salvation, and the sword of the Spirit, which is the word of God;

chokri: Süsa Thomas, cüpü Didymus (nube) lezi ketao püzükoce poti, “ukori tavo püzü sata khe.”
english: Thomas therefore, who is called Didymus, said to his fellow disciples, "Let's go also, that we may die with him."

chokri: Mhace pü neko methimeni süyo lize ne sügüsühe keyilü Jihova neko pü pü nuko thi bate; kekrelamori mi nune kethimiko uponeko sopü methide metha kemoba?
english: It is for discipline that you endure. God deals with you as with children, for what son is there whom his father doesn't discipline?

chokri: I Nyepoo ce vasüh cho, hio khiva no sideno.
english: Concerning this thing, I begged the Lord three times that it might depart from me.

chokri: qhô
english: nest

chokri: Pü kereshüce sheri thi merho, mu hako pü tüpü hako zholü keti nyüba.
english: He even tried to profane the temple, and we arrested him.

chokri: Somi thashi sümi füne kekro pü benene süto; kerhü lesidalü I püza va va ho, veli Apo mu tüyo choyimiko mhüjülü pü za po süto.
english: He who overcomes will be arrayed in white garments, and I will in no way blot his name out of the book of life, and I will confess his name before my Father, and before his angels.

chokri: Mhace humi sekemo jü poyo lize, mikena mori kekrotholü misü züde kebadolü mipüpo ufü kela kesü (uco kepo) thite.
english: If any man speaks in another language, let it be two, or at the most three, and in turn; and let one interpret.

chokri: Hiohi püzo, nhatsalü kehuko zü ketao, tüyo choyimi Sinai cejütulü jüpo kesüo, upotsa neko zü ketao, jüpo kese khapü utsü kesüo.
english: This is he who was in the assembly in the wilderness with the angel that spoke to him on Mount Sinai, and with our fathers, who received living oracles to give to us,

chokri: Süsa Agrippa Paul cepoti, No ntho nmezi poyi keve khri süho. Paul pübe chosü, de püfü kelasü.
english: Agrippa said to Paul, "You may speak for yourself." Then Paul stretched out his hand, and made his defense.

chokri: Mhace humi meri ta lize püpono pücelü mhati merai tate; neko tavori tice kejo kemo thimo ketola, mhakekreko la I tavori tice atho mha pü lüpü püzhoko po süto.
english: But if anyone is hungry, let him eat at home, lest your coming together be for judgment. The rest I will set in order whenever I come.

chokri: Jisu ukoce poti, thüma hio kephoma lari mo, mori ukrüne la rimo, vele püyo Jihova mhatho thipü mi mese mengo sü ketolazo.
english: Jesus answered, "Neither did this man sin, nor his parents; but, that the works of God might be revealed in him.

chokri: Thayowi lü mhatho ba küyi püo khapüh a cü püh müzüte, Nepoo dzütho tü no mi kütso kütoo Pü tho tüsozho küzho nha vo küto u nüyo küzho khüko ri cü phrüto.
english: From now on, there is stored up for me the crown of righteousness, which the Lord, the righteous judge, will give to me on that day; and not to me only, but also to all those who have loved his appearing.

chokri: Kemeprü thema metüyo bata; Jihova chu zapozale thita. Uko dolü, mu Jihova pü thümako meho süte.
english: Fear took hold of all, and they glorified God, saying, "A great prophet has arisen among us!" and, "God has visited his people!"

chokri: Vele Peter mu püzü ketani zünyü bata, uko co kesürice pü zapozale kethi ngo mu püzü kebani sheri ngo.
english: Now Peter and those who were with him were heavy with sleep, but when they were fully awake, they saw his glory, and the two men who stood with him.

chokri: Hako metü retu cejü tsüta, I mhafüpü ace kepo se, “Saul, Saul, no dipüla amethiba? N phepü tsahu meshüti nla rü zoto mome?”
english: When we had all fallen to the earth, I heard a voice saying to me in the Hebrew language, 'Saul, Saul, why are you persecuting me? It is hard for you to kick against the goads.'

chokri: Hatho thinpho zü hü baluri thümari zhoo bi thithüri thiyo mo.
english: For though we walk in the flesh, we don't wage war according to the flesh;

chokri: Uko pü ketso ti, Süsa no sopü? No Elijah me? Pü poti I Elija mole. No saju kepo mime? Pü uko fü kela de, I süri mole.
english: They asked him, "What then? Are you Elijah?" He said, "I am not." "Are you the Prophet?" He answered, "No."

chokri: Vele uko püzü ketüyi hota kekrelamori mhase mu Kemesa Rüpü lü pü mhapo ketakola.
english: They weren't able to withstand the wisdom and the Spirit by which he spoke.

chokri: Thüma süko mipon küsuküri hino mu u Kümünupüh pu kümülüko mu küthoo sekütako pon sükopü putsüde süde ucho thino de thi küsüko tihino tato.
english: forbidding marriage and commanding to abstain from foods which God created to be received with thanksgiving by those who believe and know the truth.

chokri: Sücesü Jisu Galilee lüno tasü Jordan rülü John po Pu püh dzülu pü tozu vori.
english: Then Jesus came from Galilee to the Jordan to John, to be baptized by him.

chokri: Thipahe ketsü kesüko tüzülü Paul züde tavo Antipatris tsoyi.
english: So the soldiers, carrying out their orders, took Paul and brought him by night to Antipatris.

chokri: Jisu pu yisü, No posü vazo; süzori I nce potü süto; Hisa nekoe Thümanuoe Kükuthoo zaco bayi die tüyono kümhülü vori küzü ngoto, zita.
english: Jesus said to him, "You have said it. Nevertheless, I tell you, henceforth you will see the Son of Man sitting at the right hand of Power, and coming on the clouds of the sky."

chokri: Mori hiko kedipü I thikekri ba ngo sheri I kehu mhüjülü kebace.
english: Or else let these men themselves say what injustice they found in me when I stood before the council,

chokri: N chephayi mo n metopo tovekrüyite.
english: "Let your loins be girded and your lamps burning.

chokri: Süsü kemelüyo Jihova kemezi thapü ka kesü kemelü, süo thopü kemüta hibi, “Kejüthomi kemelüla rhüyito.”
english: For in it is revealed God's righteousness from faith to faith. As it is written, "But the righteous shall live by faith."

chokri: Eli, Peter süko mütü mhüzülüno mo lizo die sü, No dipüh po ba sheli I se mo, zita.
english: But he denied it before them all, saying, "I don't know what you are talking about."

chokri: I ngo keti, khriva jükezho bi me sükolü kesata; khonuo pi ku keta la, pümarheko pi ri kuyi, m zasi tho kepü kopiri kuyi m pü za thopü ketako piri kuyi, jü kezho khriva yo thade, Jihova libüko (harp) pü tha.
english: I saw something like a sea of glass mixed with fire, and those who overcame the beast, his image, and the number of his name, standing on the sea of glass, having harps of God.

chokri: Uko pükepo zhokola ungophita, püjü keku kenela.
english: and they were astonished at his teaching, for his word was with authority.

chokri: Jisu pu yisü, müsührüko ri uce ne, mo tüyo rako ri u kro ne, eli thümanuo Pu pi kha thothü küyi thiri di; zisü.
english: Jesus said to him, "The foxes have holes, and the birds of the sky have nests, but the Son of Man has nowhere to lay his head."

chokri: Jisu pü saji mi keri kena koce poti, Neko sheri tata nyü bame?
english: Jesus said therefore to the twelve, "You don't also want to go away, do you?"

chokri: Süla uko mhathoko kemethu thita keto kemechelü bate; sülebimo Diana kereshüce sheri mipo thalice va keto lü bate, pü züveko jü mesu vato, Asia lü sheri mu cejülü sheri reshü ketao.
english: Not only is there danger that this our trade come into disrepute, but also that the temple of the great goddess Artemis will be counted as nothing, and her majesty destroyed, whom all Asia and the world worships."

chokri: Vele Paul poti I Jew mipü, I Tarsus lü kevorimi, Cilicia lü nadepü, nade süo melekemo pümo, I nce choyo apo thümako ce jü posüte.
english: But Paul said, "I am a Jew, from Tarsus in Cilicia, a citizen of no insignificant city. I beg you, allow me to speak to the people."

chokri: Hitülü, mhathüpü reshü thi kebace thüma metüko chozuco kech thiba.
english: The whole multitude of the people were praying outside at the hour of incense.

chokri: Jisu püfü kela kesü, süsü ntho nkepo zome, mori kekremiko aju nce kepo me?
english: Jesus answered him, "Do you say this by yourself, or did others tell you about me?"

chokri: Süsa Pu süo kütsüh püh pu celü süva, mu pu yisü, no ta rünalü vohi mori püh rünalü mipüh ceri pohite; ziva.
english: He sent him away to his house, saying, "Don't enter into the village, nor tell anyone in the village."

chokri: Renunhe, ukethükerü, thezho kehopüri süko kemetsu bamo.
english: gentleness, and self-control. Against such things there is no law.

chokri: Mha hiko mütü nieko la zo, süo ngokümüzhie po kükremi tso mükro mama küyi zü Nyepoo zale chuh küchü mamayi kütola.
english: For all things are for your sakes, that the grace, being multiplied through the many, may cause the thanksgiving to abound to the glory of God.

chokri: Süna ha thüma süzi kütsümi po rüba no utho uva krati tano kütsü Nyepo Jisu Khrista za sü dzü khasü mu tarho sasü züho.
english: Now those who are that way, we command and exhort in the Lord Jesus Christ, that with quietness they work, and eat their own bread.

chokri: Eli, pu Phariseeko mo Sadduceeko kükro pu dzülu khaküsülü vori küba ngo küyice puko yisü, Yhie! Nyhibüpü shüyieko, sopühno neko po vori küzü lükhuo mhuzülü tayi no die neko ce po sü-a?
english: But when he saw many of the Pharisees and Sadducees coming for his baptism, he said to them, "You offspring of vipers, who warned you to flee from the wrath to come?

chokri: Vele Niepo Jihova la nmelü thi kemesa yite; vele pütü metülü kerede pü mifü kelasü keto la, mi nce mhaketso kesüko kemeri püco menünu mu mpe sai de po süte.
english: But sanctify the Lord God in your hearts; and always be ready to give an answer to everyone who asks you a reason concerning the hope that is in you, with humility and fear:

chokri: khú
english: fish

chokri: Mipo thüdo kühopüyi sü ne swühite: mi lata müra mu kakütao nuo thüma kürüzüo mi mhüngo thi vokümo lü süyilho.
english: Let no one deceive you in any way. For it will not be, unless the departure comes first, and the man of sin is revealed, the son of destruction,

chokri: Süsü mejude tüyo choyimipü poti, Babylon retute, retute, rüna nadeo sü, kekrelamori shuye kede metüpo pü keregü kerezhü zokra de tekhu püte.
english: Another, a second angel, followed, saying, "Babylon the great has fallen, which has made all the nations to drink of the wine of the wrath of her sexual immorality."

chokri: I kereshüba yo bala kesüse, Sizo therü Niepo kekuo n shetiko mezizo.
english: I heard the altar saying, "Yes, Lord God, the Almighty, true and righteous are your judgments."

chokri: Süla shu kesüo zori mhapümo, mori jü khipü keti kesüo zori mhapüri zomo, vele Jihova thekü nmasü.
english: So then neither he who plants is anything, nor he who waters, but God who gives the increase.

chokri: Mhace neko tha tüso hilü hani mhatho keve thi pü renga keta thüma hiyo kesü senyü lize, dipü colü pü thimeve süta sheri.
english: if we are examined today concerning a good deed done to a crippled man, by what means this man has been healed,

chokri: Thüma sata de rhüla sü keta ju se keyice humi krü nyüta, vele kekreko poti, theju hio hako hisa reni sato.
english: Now when they heard of the resurrection of the dead, some mocked; but others said, "We want to hear you again concerning this."

chokri: Sülize pukoo Pu püh gu küvasa, Pu khüko püh somi zalü prari teshi die cethi khüle thi.
english: Crucifying him, they parted his garments among them, casting lots on them, what each should take.

chokri: I nekoce jüthopü posüto, hice ketha humi Jihova kede ngokemothe sata keho kropü tha.
english: But I tell you the truth: There are some of those who stand here, who will in no way taste of death, until they see the Kingdom of God."

chokri: Kekrelamori Jihova tsükhri tüyo kiri, kehü khapü cejüo tsüsü.
english: For the bread of God is that which comes down out of heaven, and gives life to the world."

chokri: Süsa ceta süo ne nyepoo pu phimüzhe die pu khasü va, mo pu poko ri va pu prü va.
english: The lord of that servant, being moved with compassion, released him, and forgave him the debt.

chokri: Süo püh whuyi kütasa ha müchüh sa mo tato.
english: if so be that being clothed we will not be found naked.

chokri: Vele uko rüna veku tipü menyü tate, süosü trülü, sülano Jihova uko cüpü uko Rüo kethi menga tamo; pü nadepü kesüpü ukotsüsü.
english: But now they desire a better country, that is, a heavenly one. Therefore God is not ashamed of them, to be called their God, for he has prepared a city for them.

chokri: Vele Jisu pütho pü khapü uko tsü sümo, kekrelamori pü thümako metü se kebala.
english: But Jesus didn't trust himself to them, because he knew everyone,

chokri: Süo ha Jihova mhüdzülü Khrista rüh küveo thite, külayi kütako mhüdzülü ri mu kataküzüko mhüdzülü ri:
english: For we are a sweet aroma of Christ to God, in those who are saved, and in those who perish;

chokri: M kemhülü kebao pü zefüne khi cejüo rüsü, cejü side rüyita.
english: He who sat on the cloud thrust his sickle on the earth, and the earth was reaped.

chokri: N nobulü no nuneyito thepumipü. Püza thopü Jisu thite.
english: Behold, you will conceive in your womb, and bring forth a son, and will call his name 'Jesus.'

chokri: Kekrelamori neko kemethami thi keta mesü neko mipo neko metha zoba keta Jihova jü kerace kepoko; jükemetü mori nojü jü kemenü, ketico (themu) mori natsimi co.
english: For when by reason of the time you ought to be teachers, you again need to have someone teach you the rudiments of the first principles of the oracles of God. You have come to need milk, and not solid food.

chokri: Tsee! Chorazin, no thiyite! Tsee! Bethsaida, nori thiyite! Kükrenamoli, mhatho küzho thi puh nece küsüko hi bi die Tyre mo Sidon nyi rünalü ri thisü lize puko-e thazütho gakhrokhü mo nyogwü süh die thülü küdeyi tato murü.
english: "Woe to you, Chorazin! Woe to you, Bethsaida! For if the mighty works had been done in Tyre and Sidon which were done in you, they would have repented long ago in sackcloth and ashes.

chokri: Pü ukoce poti, neko menuyite, neko kedo va mo ketola, thüma kekro azalü vorito, uko poti, I Khrista zole (süle); pütü süo meno bate, süla neko süko sameji ta hite.
english: He said, "Watch out that you don't get led astray, for many will come in my name, saying, 'I AM,' and, 'The time is at hand.' Therefore don't follow them.

chokri: Hice, kemesamiko sügüsühe bata: uko Jihova khakesüko zü m Jisu yo kemelü khi bata.
english: Here is the patience of the saints, those who keep the commandments of God, and the faith of Jesus."

chokri: Pü jü sübi po kesüsa tsükhri tiyi, uko mhüjülü Jihova kemeza posü, pü tsükhri cephro süde khi tiyi.
english: When he had said this, and had taken bread, he gave thanks to God in the presence of all, and he broke it, and began to eat.

chokri: Gallio Achaia lü kezho (proconsul) thiba, Jews miko Paul metsu sürita side pütüzü sheco kezhoo cevo.
english: But when Gallio was proconsul of Achaia, the Jews with one accord rose up against Paul and brought him before the judgment seat,

chokri: Nietho nie pesüte nie kümülü lü hü ba memo si. Nietho nie dojü süte, Khrista yo hü ba memo si? Nie uzholü hüyi ba mota motho!
english: Test your own selves, whether you are in the faith. Test your own selves. Or don't you know as to your own selves, that Jesus Christ is in you?--unless indeed you are disqualified.

chokri: Uko ukhapü apostleko kemetha jüzü thi mu kemekro siba zota, tsükhri cephro ti mu kecho thi sizi bata.
english: They continued steadfastly in the apostles' teaching and fellowship, in the breaking of bread, and prayer.

chokri: Pue mha pe sü die poti; I thümako ngopüh sühboko ta küba bite; zisü.
english: He looked up, and said, "I see men; for I see them like trees walking."

chokri: Menuyite, thüma kehopü pori utho ukelü mhase kemethu kemerü pü neko shu ketse mu nejü mesu vamo ketola, thüma zhoreleko, cejülü natsimi mhase, mu Khrista lü kemo zhüko.
english: Be careful that you don't let anyone rob you through his philosophy and vain deceit, after the tradition of men, after the elements of the world, and not after Christ.

chokri: Herod tetrarch (governor) püsüko kethi seba. Pülü kehokero (meyhu) thita, kekrelamori humi pücepoti John saketa-o rhüla sütele sizi süta.
english: Now Herod the tetrarch heard of all that was done by him; and he was very perplexed, because it was said by some that John had risen from the dead,

chokri: Mi nopu ne ucemi neyo thi kezüdü thipü tsüte, mu sübi micemi neri unopu neyo thi kezü dü thi tsü te.
english: Let the husband render to his wife the affection owed her, and likewise also the wife to her husband.

chokri: Nüko cüpüh u sadzü püh na cü küyi kümha, thümo püh mu Ropüyi pühtazo.
english: There is one body, and one Spirit, even as you also were called in one hope of your calling;

chokri: Kesa thasü kephoma mu kephoma keku sü thezho.
english: The sting of death is sin, and the power of sin is the law.

chokri: Pü kevori mhüjü John thelü redekeyi jülo pü Israel thümako tsü.
english: before his coming, when John had first preached the baptism of repentance to Israel.

chokri: Süsa Peter taki Cornelius thüma ketsü kesüko ceki, de poti Hihe, I neko phukevori-o le, kedipüla neko aphu vorizüa?
english: Peter went down to the men, and said, "Behold, I am he whom you seek. Why have you come?"

chokri: Süsa Paul poti, Jihova po nvüsüte, no sazho kemegao; kekrelamori no asheco thiketola bala, thezho kemolü avüsüno no pobale?
english: Then Paul said to him, "God will strike you, you whitewashed wall! Do you sit to judge me according to the law, and command me to be struck contrary to the law?"

chokri: Kekrelamori süko Niepoo Jisu Khrista choyi thi mori utho uva yitho thita yo, uko jükeve m kemenü jüpode thüma kemoko shu ketse tayo.
english: For those who are such don't serve our Lord, Jesus Christ, but their own belly; and by their smooth and flattering speech, they deceive the hearts of the innocent.

chokri: Jü hiko posü zo sheri uko kethüyi mozota, de kereshü thipü uni reshü tole zota.
english: Even saying these things, they hardly stopped the multitudes from making a sacrifice to them.

chokri: Thadzü Michael tülü choyi küzhoo thonu thürüküshüo zü no Moses mo küso die küpali kücülü püh müjo mpe ta die “Niepoo tho n müjo to” shita.
english: But Michael, the archangel, when contending with the devil and arguing about the body of Moses, dared not bring against him an abusive condemnation, but said, "May the Lord rebuke you!"

chokri: Püphece usaco kratha, pümhüjü popü püphe vade püpitha khi shüsü, de püphe mebosü, süsa tirü süo pü kenhüsü.
english: Standing behind at his feet weeping, she began to wet his feet with her tears, and she wiped them with the hair of her head, kissed his feet, and anointed them with the ointment.

chokri: Tüyochoyio püfü kelasü, I Gabriel. I Jihova mhüjülü thayo, A ketsüpü nce posüno zisü, mu jüyikeve hio khi püvo n metsosü.
english: The angel answered him, "I am Gabriel, who stands in the presence of God. I was sent to speak to you, and to bring you this good news.

chokri: Simon Peter püketso de sopü po ba sheri pübe chopü jüpoba.
english: Simon Peter therefore beckoned to him, and said to him, "Tell us who it is of whom he speaks."

chokri: Süosü Jeremiah sadzühküse-oe po püh kümüta;
english: Then that which was spoken by Jeremiah the prophet was fulfilled, saying,

chokri: Kükrenamoli, Khrista kücezü mo sadzühküse kücezü süri die mha zasi kümüre mo u malhü mhathoko thi püh mi müka to; sidie thiyi küvethe küda küyiko ri shu kütse züh tato tina.
english: For there will arise false christs, and false prophets, and they will show great signs and wonders, so as to lead astray, if possible, even the chosen ones.

chokri: I khrü ketsüko lekhu süyo, m methi süyo; n nüsai m rhürha yite, nlü kede yite.
english: As many as I love, I reprove and chasten. Be zealous therefore, and repent.

chokri: Süla Jisu kekhrü sajio Peter ce poti, Niepoo tele. Simon Peter Niepoo tele siti se kesüce, pü füketü füne khipü püzheyi, (kekrelamori pü mechü tatila), de ta jülü lüta.
english: That disciple therefore whom Jesus loved said to Peter, "It's the Lord!" So when Simon Peter heard that it was the Lord, he wrapped his coat around him (for he was naked), and threw himself into the sea.

chokri: I neko ce potü süto, mha hikohi mütü thi tsühyi kümothe, tsüdo nulhü hiohi di talho.
english: Most assuredly I tell you, this generation will not pass away, until all these things are accomplished.

chokri: Püpo uko nüthisü de Paul metsu ketola, püzü Jerusalem lü kino zisü, size uko cholü pü fü ba pü dokhri va ketola.
english: asking a favor against him, that he would summon him to Jerusalem; plotting to kill him on the way.

chokri: Uko pükrünyü bata, pü sa keta se kebala.
english: They were ridiculing him, knowing that she was dead.

chokri: Tekonuo mohor zhü kemeta phrü kesü I ngo, mu thetsü fü bi se, khonu dako mipu pode, “vori pete,”
english: I saw that the Lamb opened one of the seven seals, and I heard one of the four living creatures saying, as with a voice of thunder, "Come and see!"

chokri: U Niepoo pülü cho keba sü kelakeyi zo, uko sazüjürao Paul mhase khapü ketsü bi pü lesi thopü neko tsüsü te.
english: Regard the patience of our Lord as salvation; even as our beloved brother Paul also, according to the wisdom given to him, wrote to you;

chokri: I Niepo Jisu la melü m sekeba, mhapüyori mesa kemo bamo, vele somi pütho lüde mesa kemo thi taze pula mesa mote.
english: I know, and am persuaded in the Lord Jesus, that nothing is unclean of itself; except that to him who considers anything to be unclean, to him it is unclean.

chokri: Pübe chopü püyo sü, mu metha thenopü tha medü yita, de Jihova zapozale posüta.
english: He laid his hands on her, and immediately she stood up straight, and glorified God.

chokri: Sidie Pu natsimi püh züh vori puko dolü süyi; mu Pu süo rhapühyi die sü puko ce;
english: He took a little child, and set him in the midst of them. Taking him in his arms, he said to them,

chokri: Vetho küthiko yhevetho, kükrenamoli süko yisü Jihova nune lie ci zoto tina.
english: Blessed are the peacemakers, For they shall be called children of God.

chokri: I nekoce potü süto, mhace humi ajüko khipü bayi lize pü mhapü ceri sa taho.
english: Most assuredly, I tell you, if a person keeps my word, he will never see death."

chokri: M mhametükolü nekhapü mhakeve kethilü thaka thisüte, thezho keve thi merho va kemo, metüte, mu sürhü sürho tilü.
english: in all things showing yourself an example of good works; in your teaching showing integrity, seriousness, incorruptibility,

chokri: Sübi kede revü renayi kehozhü uko ngoyite, süla uko ngokemezhe khipüh bayi khe, sülü uko Jihova poyi keshü thi Pü rho Pü reshüsa mu kempe thitokhe.
english: Therefore, receiving a Kingdom that can't be shaken, let us have grace, through which we serve God acceptably, with reverence and awe,

chokri: Ne Israelites aramiko, apono nekoce potü süte uko potsa David sü sate mu pü khrü riva, pü mhakhre sheri tsühi azü bazo tha ketso.
english: "Brothers, I may tell you freely of the patriarch David, that he both died and was buried, and his tomb is with us to this day.

chokri: Thezho mu saju kepoko vo John ketso Jihova kede zhopo thisü mu thüma kehopüri süko phutazo.
english: The law and the prophets were until John. From that time the Gospel of the Kingdom of God is preached, and everyone is forcing his way into it.

chokri: Silizo nekoe kümüsao celü künhüküyi ngoite, mu neko mha mütüko seyiyo.
english: You have an anointing from the Holy One, and you know the truth.

chokri: Süsa sekrüküzhoo pu khü cekhro die sü, uko dipüh zhopo phu la sa ta?
english: The high priest tore his clothes, and said, "What further need have we of witnesses?

chokri: Füha keyo kenao salü kereshüba süo cüpü kemesatho, siyo.
english: After the second veil was the tabernacle which is called the Holy of Holies,

chokri: Süsa pu rükri küde-o ce lüri diesü; npo John mi dzülu kha küsüo pi püh mükhu pühlü sü püh vori a prü no die shoyo; zita.
english: She came in immediately with haste to the king, and asked, "I want you to give me right now the head of John the Baptizer on a platter."

chokri: Pethi mehi 24 ko, m khonu 4 ko zürütsü Jihova reshü ta kedebalü kebao, uko pode “Haleluya”
english: The twenty-four elders and the four living creatures fell down and worshiped God who sits on the throne, saying, "Amen! Hallelujah!"

chokri: Süsa Phariseeko Pu yisü. Yhie puko dipüh la kürülüzho nha thüzho kümo thiyo zo la! Zita.
english: The Pharisees said to him, "Behold, why do they do that which is not lawful on the Sabbath day?"

chokri: Pü thenopü ce po kesü, n kemelü la nkela süteho, nnüde tavo tate, site.
english: He said to the woman, "Your faith has saved you. Go in peace."

chokri: Eli, pu zü süko müdo kübace, yhie, Nyep-o shoyimi püh pu mholü puce vori die pu yisü, Yhie, No David nu Joseph, no Mary yi püh n cemi thi müprüh tahite. Kükrenamori, pu nu lhüpü kübao sü Kümüsa Rüpü lüno zo kütina.
english: But when he thought about these things, behold, an angel of the Lord appeared to him in a dream, saying, "Joseph, son of David, don't be afraid to take to yourself Mary, your wife, for that which is conceived in her is of the Holy Spirit.

chokri: Sidie pukoe khrito vo küta dolü zhosao vorita, mo kürüdepü ba kütakoe zhosao züh die nolü Ihülü lüta, sidie cekha khayita.
english: While they went away to buy, the bridegroom came, and those who were ready went in with him to the marriage feast, and the door was shut.

chokri: Noe, kürügü kürüzü thi sü, mi dokhri su, mi rügo su, kücezü zhopo thi su, cezü die mi swüti su, npo nzu rhoyi, zi die zü kha küsüko se ba tho? Zita
english: You know the commandments: 'Do not murder,' 'Do not commit adultery,' 'Do not steal,' 'Do not give false testimony,' 'Do not defraud,' 'Honor your father and mother.'"

chokri: Sücesü Jisu-e küla die sü; Apo, tü mo cejü mhu Nyepoo, n müza ve; Kükrenamoli, no mha küsekülüko mhuzülü mha hiko küva püh müta die püh payhoko müsemüngo küsü na.
english: At that time, Jesus answered, "I thank you, Father, Lord of heaven and earth, that you hid these things from the wise and understanding, and revealed them to infants.

chokri: Jisu püce poti, “Nprüo rhüla sürito.”
english: Jesus said to her, "Your brother will rise again."

chokri: Sülü mipüza Aeneas siti ba, püzilü tütse tütha zütata, lasa kethi thide.
english: There he found a certain man named Aeneas, who had been bedridden for eight years, because he was paralyzed.

chokri: Neko sheri sübi ti thite, mu kehopü sheri hako zü mhathi ketako yo; kekhrühi kesüko.
english: that you also be in subjection to such, and to everyone who helps in the work and labors.

chokri: I neko metü pobamo, I pü kedakeyio poba tizo; vele ketholesi po tsoyi ketola, pü azü tsükhri ketio püphekapü amesü: siti kepo.
english: I don't speak concerning all of you. I know whom I have chosen. But that the Scripture may be fulfilled, 'He who eats bread with me has lifted up his heel against me.'

chokri: Süsa Sadducee mipü ta püce vori, uko rhülakesü bamo le ziyo; mu pü ketsoti.
english: Some of the Sadducees came to him, those who deny that there is a resurrection.

chokri: Pü celü vori, mipüpori celü lü mota, Peter, James mu John ko lebisa, mu püpo püzuni, (thenopü nepo mu uzuni).
english: When he came to the house, he didn't allow anyone to enter in, except Peter, John, James, the father of the child, and her mother.

chokri: Kühu pethio yolü mhapuh pata zori mi küna küsü se mu ngotüzomo lize rünyi hite.
english: Don't receive an accusation against an elder, except at the word of two or three witnesses.

chokri: Kekrelamori mipüri kemekhrülü mhathi yomo, mipo nse nyüsa ba lize. Mhace no mhathi kebako pü cejülü mesesü nyü ba tisa.
english: For no one does anything in secret, and himself seeks to be known openly. If you do these things, reveal yourself to the world."

chokri: Thelalü, neko metü lüpü thite, hunehu khrü, mu sazüjüra kekhrü khi kephimezhe te, mi meso nyüsa te, merhe medü te.
english: Finally, be all like-minded, compassionate, loving as brothers, tenderhearted, courteous,

chokri: Mo Pu unyi yisü, A samüdziyite, I nenyi po thüma kütümi thito; zisü.
english: He said to them, "Come after me, and I will make you fishers for men."

chokri: Pü sülü po kesü, jükho kesapü, pü thera thi kevü süve; tsühi süo cereta mu dita keto kerede süte.
english: In that he says, "A new covenant," he has made the first old. But that which is becoming old and grows aged is near to vanishing away.

chokri: Süsa humi süri cejü die Pu kümütsu zhopo po die sü;
english: Some stood up, and gave false testimony against him, saying,

chokri: Mhace no a pü n besüo le phri yo süze, n nü de a züyi yoti bi, a bizo no püzü yite.
english: If then you count me a partner, receive him as you would receive me.

chokri: Jisu püce po kesü, “No püngo bate, mu püzü kerethi kethao zo.”
english: Jesus said to him, "You have both seen him, and it is he who speaks with you."

chokri: Jisu püce pokesü, I dipü thiba sheri neko tsühi seyiho, vele no hisa seyito.
english: Jesus answered him, "You don't know what I am doing now, but you will understand later."

chokri: Uko süo thipü ketsüsü, Saul mu Barnabas ni belü ketsüsü.
english: which they also did, sending it to the elders by the hands of Barnabas and Saul.

chokri: Jews miko püce poti, hako se bate, therü kesu nzüta. Abraham sate, mu saju kepoko ri sate; mu no poti, mhace neko akepoko züyi lize thüma süo mhapü ceri sa taho.
english: Then the Jews said to him, "Now we know that you have a demon. Abraham died, and the prophets; and you say, 'If a man keeps my word, he will never taste of death.'

chokri: Pü ukoce poti, Hihe, Satan tüyo metha kekrithi cejü kiri keta I ngo ho.
english: He said to them, "I saw Satan having fallen like lightning from heaven.

chokri: Süsa puko Galileelü balu tice, Jisu puko yisü, thümanuo tü püh mi belü sü vato.
english: While they were staying in Galilee, Jesus said to them, "The Son of Man is about to be delivered up into the hands of men,

chokri: Pü ukephomako khipü püphoyo süyi, südüyo (cross yo) side ukephomako la sata zo sheri kemezilü rhü sala yi zoto, pü kevü kuko la uthi kesürho sü.
english: who his own self bore our sins in his body on the tree, that we, having died to sins, might live to righteousness; by whose stripes you were healed.

chokri: Shüdülü Jihova zü tazo.
english: The same was in the beginning with God.

chokri: Uko taprata side jüyikeve zhopothi rüna metülü, mu kethi thi kesürho sü.
english: They departed, and went throughout the villages, preaching the Gospel, and healing everywhere.

chokri: Püpo süopü mipüceri pohino sisü; vele no tavo thevoo mhüngo thisüte, mu mesaketa Moses zholü popü kemetako thivate, uko mhüjülü zhopo khakesü.
english: He charged him to tell no one, "But go your way, and show yourself to the priest, and offer for your cleansing according to what Moses commanded, for a testimony to them."

chokri: Thenopüpü tütse kerikena thüzakrü tata, pü mhango keyiko metü khipü daru kesemi la ketseva, sizizori püthi kesürhoyi mo.
english: A woman who had a flow of blood for twelve years, who had spent all her living on physicians, and could not be healed by any,

chokri: Paul mu Silvanus mu Timothy uko khapüh U Kümünupüh u Po mu u Nyepo Jisu Khrista checho baküta Thessaloniako kühu che küsü:
english: Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy, to the assembly of the Thessalonians in God our Father, and the Lord Jesus Christ:

chokri: Jisu ukoce poti, tüso kebace bavüdo kerikena ba mome? Thüma kehopüri tüso kebace chota lize püphe mesü vaho, kekrelamori pü cejülü keveo ngo kebala.
english: Jesus answered, "Aren't there twelve hours of daylight? If a man walks in the day, he doesn't stumble, because he sees the light of this world.

chokri: Püza poküzhoko yi, kükukoyi, kümütükoyi mu mi kükhayoküzhoko, tsüdo külhü lübi zomode thasa vokütoko ceyi thüza mütü mhu kürükrü-o thive.
english: far above all rule, and authority, and power, and dominion, and every name that is named, not only in this age, but also in that which is to come.

chokri: I a Po zalü vori, neko azüyi mote; mhace kekremipü pütho püzalü vori lize neko pü zü yito.
english: I have come in my Father's name, and you don't receive me. If another comes in his own name, you will receive him.

chokri: Vele püzho khrizü ketami, teko kroko püzhü kemola sace vori kezü ngo süde pü tata yo, sace vori de teko kro tüva mu hupho vayo.
english: He who is a hired hand, and not a shepherd, who doesn't own the sheep, sees the wolf coming, leaves the sheep, and flees. The wolf snatches the sheep, and scatters them.

chokri: M I keshuo thenyü pü pütsü süto.
english: and I will give him the morning star.

chokri: Süsa John sadziko-e Puce vori die sü, Dipüh na hako mo Phariseeko tsükünu kümvo yo, mo n sadzi ko-e mvo yo mo-a?
english: Then John's disciples came to him, saying, "Why do we and the Pharisees fast often, but your disciples don't fast?"

chokri: Siri hunehu kükhrüo la, m I Paul, I tsate m süsa ri tsü Khrista Jisu la thejü thi kütala, n ce a müzhe mülo kütsü a nü kute.
english: yet for love's sake I rather beg, being such a one as Paul, the aged, but also a prisoner of Jesus Christ.

chokri: I thüzhoo mo sadzühküseko zü thi müdi va tozu die vori küti neko lüta hite, I süko thi müdi va mori thi tsüh sü to küvori zo.
english: "Don't think that I came to destroy the law or the prophets. I didn't come to destroy, but to fulfill.

chokri: Süsa pü ta Samaria nade pülü voyi, süo cüpü Sychar siyo, thethi süo Jacob popü pünu Joseph tsükesü kemenoce ba.
english: So he came to a city of Samaria, called Sychar, near the parcel of ground that Jacob gave to his son, Joseph.

chokri: Tüzülü zümhopü khapü Paul mengosü, thümapü thade püce choti, ta Macedonia lü kiri de hako khrühi süthaze.
english: A vision appeared to Paul in the night. There was a man of Macedonia standing, begging him, and saying, "Come over into Macedonia and help us."

chokri: Uko cejüo mote, I sheri cejüo kemobi.
english: They are not of the world even as I am not of the world.

chokri: Neko pü melü ketosa asheri melü tevele, kekrelamori pü aju thopü meta.
english: For if you believed Moses, you would believe me; for he wrote about me.

chokri: Vele Barnabas tavo püzü sajiko dolü vori, side pü cholü Niepoo zü kesüti ukoceposü. Side pü kedipü bide Damascus lü thepu shude Jisu ju po kesü kori sa posü.
english: But Barnabas took him, and brought him to the apostles, and declared to them how he had seen the Lord in the way, and that he had spoken to him, and how at Damascus he had preached boldly in the name of Jesus.

chokri: Neko neponeko mhatho thiyo. Uko püce po sala kesü, Hako kephoma mhatho kesulü menu yimo; ha Po püba mu süo Jihova zo.
english: You do the works of your father." They said to him, "We were not born of sexual immorality. We have one Father, God."

chokri: Sidie puseko ji pariyi ta mütha; süo kürüh tü kütasa mi zeküne khasü tayo.
english: But when the fruit is ripe, immediately he puts forth the sickle, because the harvest has come."

chokri: Stephen keku mu kemelü neshu, de zasi ungo mhathoko thipü thümako dolü süta.
english: Stephen, full of faith and power, performed great wonders and signs among the people.

chokri: Nngo hite, I nce kepo No menu kesala moze su zi kesüla.
english: Don't marvel that I said to you, 'You must be born anew.'

chokri: Mha hikohi dipüh küthice tato sheli hace po süte; mu mha hikohi thi tsüyi ta to küzüce dipüh püh bata? Zi die kütso ta.
english: "Tell us, when will these things be? What is the sign that these things are all about to be fulfilled?"

chokri: Püzü kebako mhathi sü keto vori kezü ngo de poti, “niepoo hako zecho pü dosü tome?”
english: When those who were around him saw what was about to happen, they said to him, "Lord, shall we strike with the sword?"

chokri: Pü ango metsü ketao a Po sheri ngo metsü tazo.
english: He who hates me, hates my Father also.

chokri: Kümülo mo mhüceko. Ka sunako me mo die süko thi kümüsayi küta kürüsuceo zhoku ta?
english: You blind fools! For which is greater, the gold, or the temple that sanctifies the gold?

chokri: I nekoce potü süto, cejü mütü züyiküve hio püh zhopo thisü küto mütülü, thüno hipü mhathi küsü hi kürükra ri sa po zoto, zita.
english: Most assuredly I tell you, wherever this Gospel is preached in the whole world, what this woman has done will also be spoken of as a memorial of her."

chokri: Süze mipühno puceri kükumi püh celü lü die pu tüpüh pha va müra modie dipüh bi die pu mhako mükayi veta? Pu tüpüh pha küva züh pu mhako khiyi küve zo.
english: Or how can one enter into the house of the strong man, and plunder his goods, unless he first bind the strong man? Then he will plunder his house.

chokri: Mpe hite, Paul, no Caesar mhüjülü voto, Hihe, nzü revü ketako kelapü ntsü süto.
english: saying, 'Don't be afraid, Paul. You must stand before Caesar. Behold, God has granted you all those who sail with you.'

chokri: Pharisee süthayi de kechothi sü, therüo I n meza, I thüma kekremi bi kemola, mizhü kethi kedü tiyo, jüthomo, regü rezhü mori matu kehomi thüma hio ri bi kemola.
english: The Pharisee stood and prayed to himself like this: 'God, I thank you, that I am not like the rest of men, extortioners, unrighteous, adulterers, or even like this tax collector.

chokri: Mhakükro thopüh niekotsü kütoba siri I lesi mu lesidzü nie süh ti cieri I a tho mhotsu no vori nieko zü kürüthi tayo unü tsüh zo küto lü bate.
english: Having many things to write to you, I don't want to do so with paper and ink, but I hope to come to you, and to speak face to face, that our joy may be made full.

chokri: Kekrelamori mikekha ketisü mhakeve kethimi la kethi kedü ti zhümo, vele kesu kethi milazo. Süla no kekusü mpe mome? Size mhakeve thiyi te süsa n mejo taho.
english: For rulers are not a terror to the good work, but to the evil. Do you desire to have no fear of the authority? Do that which is good, and you will have praise from the same,

chokri: Sümi po sheyite, küjoküthio kükrikütsü cholü ta de pü zü lavo küyiyolü küsalü küphomao ropü külayito muküjokümo kükro whuyi tato.
english: let him know that he who turns a sinner from the error of his way will save a soul from death, and will cover a multitude of sins.

chokri: Süsa uko poti, Pü kepo pütü dopü sizi tisü dipü po bata?
english: They said therefore, "What is this that he says, 'A little while?' We don't know what he is saying."

chokri: Kekrelamori Niepoo mhü kemezimi pe bayo, mu pü ni sheri uko kecho la khripü bayo, vele Niepoo püzü khipü mhakesu kethiko metsu tayo.
english: For the eyes of the Lord are on the righteous, And his ears open to their prayer; But the face of the Lord is against those who do evil."

chokri: Mo pü sü pherite zisü, sücesü Peter püzuyono ta kiri die Jisuce phe tozü die dzüyono ta süta.
english: He said, "Come!" Peter stepped down from the boat, and walked on the waters to come to Jesus.

chokri: Niepoo tüzülü zümholü Paul cepode, Mha mpe hite, vele jüpo süte mu kemekre ta hite.
english: The Lord said to Paul in the night by a vision, "Don't be afraid, but speak and don't be silent;

chokri: Khrista Jisu yolü kümüsako mütü külü süte. U zümi a zü kübako mütü nieko külü süho.
english: Greet every saint in Christ Jesus. The brothers who are with me greet you.

chokri: Uko pütü keve kebace bi uko thüma metü koyo mhakeve thisü khe, metüko ceri kerekri thipü kemelü lü kebako cekroyo thisü khe.
english: So then, as we have opportunity, let's do what is good toward all men, and especially toward those who are of the household of the faith.

chokri: Size-e ha n kükhrü la hanü phaho ba, mo ha lüri luyi kükrelamori, a sazüo no kümüsako mülü thi merhüsala küyi la.
english: For we have much joy and comfort in your love, because the hearts of the saints have been refreshed through you, brother.

chokri: Simon sheri melü yita, pü jülopü keyice pü Philip sameji de ungo mhathoko mu zasi thi kesüko pepü pü mahüthi püngo thita.
english: Simon himself also believed. Being baptized, he continued with Philip. Seeing signs and great miracles occuring, he was amazed.

chokri: I dipü posata? Gideon ju posaketo pütü bamote, Barak sheri, mu Samuel sajukepoo sheri; Samson, Jephthae, David hiko metü.
english: What more shall I say? For the time would fail me if I told of Gideon, Barak, Samson, Jephthah, David, Samuel, and the prophets;

chokri: Sücesü pethiküzhoko mo Phariseekoe Pu züve süo se küyice; puko na po bazo küti seyi.
english: When the chief priests and the Pharisees heard his parables, they perceived that he spoke about them.

chokri: Thenopü cepoko süo ngo side uko kepra kemeveko thiyi su keta la Paul mu Silas ni tüpü kezhoko kehu keba thethilü vota.
english: But when her masters saw that the hope of their gain was gone, they seized Paul and Silas, and dragged them into the marketplace before the rulers.

chokri: Silizo hako pu celü thüdzu seküyiyo mu phrapüh neko ce küsüo sü Jihova küveo zo, mu küzü pührei püyolü tayo moto zo küti-o zo.
english: This is the message which we have heard from him and announce to you, that God is light, and in him is no darkness at all.

chokri: Mipüpori neko shu ketse va hite, dopü ce lebila zhokhro tüyo choyimi kereshü, tsapha talü mha hiko ngokemolü talüta, uthi upho mhülü kengopo uthi kerekrü kemethulü süyi.
english: Let no one rob you of your prize by a voluntary humility and worshipping of the angels, dwelling in the things which he has not seen, vainly puffed up by his fleshly mind,

chokri: Mo thüma kühopühri a zalüno natsimine hihi bi küti pühri zühyiyo kütimi a zühyiyo.
english: Whoever receives one such little child in my name receives me,

chokri: Sücesü mi Jisu po pu be shopüh nyi die sho süno die natsimiko züh Puce vori; eli Pusadziko süko küthita.
english: Then little children were brought to him, that he should lay his hands on them and pray; and the disciples rebuked them.

chokri: Philip püce poti, no nmelü metü khi melüyi ta tisa no jülo püyive. Pü poti, Jisu Khrista Jihova nuzo, I melüte.
english: And Philip said, If thou believest with all thine heart, thou mayest. And he answered and said, I believe that Jesus Christ is the Son of God.

chokri: Pümhü khrüpü methakeyiko pede poti, “neko mhakediko thejo kepütho, kekrelamori Jihova (tüyo) kede neko zhüzo tila.
english: He lifted up his eyes to his disciples, and said, "Blessed are you who are poor, For yours is the Kingdom of God.

chokri: Tüso vori ketace mehi miko, thevo kezhoko, mu thezhokeseko tavo kehulü kenguyi, mu uko püzü kehulü vo.
english: As soon as it was day, the assembly of the elders of the people was gathered together, both chief priests and scribes, and they led him away into their council, saying,

chokri: Azühko, nieko ri a do zühyite, siyo hako nieko mhüdzü rade tha süko pe n türütüro thiyite.
english: Brothers, be imitators together of me, and note those who walk this way, even as you have us for an example.

chokri: M uko nyopha pü ukopi kezapü bata, de kra, thekri thi ulü shü to, de poti, Alas, Alas nade tsüo le, ruyo mhama kerü jükezho lü pü vo ri pü thi mene kesüko, bavüdo pülü di mesate.
english: They cast dust on their heads, and cried, weeping and mourning, saying, 'Woe, woe, the great city, in which all who had their ships in the sea were made rich by reason of her great wealth!' For in one hour is she made desolate.

chokri: Khrista Jisu cetani Paul mo Timothy uni-e khapüh Philppi lü keba Khrista Jisu lü keta kemesako, pethimiko mu dikonko ce kesü:
english: Paul and Timothy, servants of Jesus Christ; To all the saints in Christ Jesus who are at Philippi, with the overseers and deacons:

chokri: Tüyo choyimi kena bade ngo, mipü püphece mu kekreo püpico, Jisu pü khrü kesü thilü.
english: and she saw two angels in white sitting, one at the head, and one at the feet, where the body of Jesus had lain.

chokri: Mo neko vo küyice; tüyo küde münoto taho; zi küti posüte;
english: As you go, preach, saying, 'The Kingdom of Heaven is at hand!'

chokri: tòlā
english: uncooked rice

chokri: Joppa lü kehüko metü süo sede Niepoo melüyi.
english: And it became known throughout all Joppa, and many believed in the Lord.

chokri: Pücelü voride pükhretho mu püzanu miko cü kenguyi de ukocepoti, azü nenüyite, kekrelamori a teko di ketao ngoyi ketala.
english: When he comes home, he calls together his friends and his neighbors, saying to them, 'Rejoice with me, for I have found my sheep which was lost!'

chokri: Annas mu Caiphais ni thevokezhotho thiba, Jihova jü john cevori, Zacharias nu nhatsalü ketao.
english: in the high priesthood of Annas and Caiaphas, the word of God came to John, the son of Zacharias, in the wilderness.

chokri: Süla I thevo kezhoko celü keku ngo keyila ta Damuscus lü kizü.
english: "Whereupon as I traveled to Damascus with the authority and commission from the chief priests,

chokri: Mhahiko kemekhrü pü melülü thi kesü, mu püzü nekü tsü Jihova reshü tato, mu Jihova neko züta kethozo sizi tato.
english: And thus the secrets of his heart are revealed. So he will fall down on his face and worship God, declaring that God is among you indeed.

chokri: Mu ti küyiko mütü küsa thüma nyeda müsüh.
english: Those who had eaten were about four thousand. Then he sent them away.

chokri: Mu lüsiküseko mu sekrükoe zü süo se, sidie pukoe Pu müka va küto do phuta. Kükrelamori, pukoe müprüh küti thümakoe Pu kümütha züko la u malhü thi ba küta la.
english: The chief priests and the scribes heard it, and sought how they might destroy him. For they feared him, because all the multitude was astonished at his teaching.

chokri: Neko fü mu laba zote, kemelü lü tha metü pü bate thepumi thipü bate, metü meco yite;
english: Watch! Stand firm in the faith! Be courageous! Be strong!

chokri: Mipüri ace vori yiho a Po tho pü tüsüpü vori zo kemosa, mu thela nha pü phu mesü yito.
english: No one can come to me unless the Father who sent me draws him, and I will raise him up in the last day.

chokri: Sidie Jisue thüma kroo mu Pu sadziko ci püh puce süyi die pukoce; Thüma kühopühri a sa müdzi künyimi putho pu müla va die pu cross püh die asa müdziyite.
english: He called the multitude to himself with his disciples, and said to them, "Whoever wants to come after me, let him deny himself, and take up his cross, and follow me.

chokri: Kereshücelü thümapü rüpü mesakemo füphra se meto bayo.
english: In the synagogue there was a man who had a spirit of an unclean demon, and he cried out with a loud voice,

chokri: A kengo, tüyo choyimi pü tü metsu lü prüde füphrameto ti, “lüzhe, lüzhe, lüzhe cejü kehü miko püco tüyochoyimi kekre sü thecü füsa sü ketola.”
english: I saw, and I heard an eagle, flying in mid heaven, saying with a loud voice, "Woe! Woe! Woe for those who dwell on the earth, because of the other voices of the trumpets of the three angels, who are yet to sound!"

chokri: Süze Pu süko yisü thüma kühopühri unyi ne die rünyiyi kütomi po rünyiyi te, zita.
english: He said, "Whoever has ears to hear, let him hear."

chokri: Süri pu mo lie sü; I semo mu n küpoco süri semo zo ho; zita. Sidie putasü zünyocebo saco prata. Sücesü thüvü khu ta.
english: But he denied it, saying, "I neither know, nor understand what you are saying." He went out on the porch, and the rooster crowed.

chokri: Uko metü serekrü de poti, thüma hio mo vele Barabbas te. Barabbas lize mizhü süketimipü.
english: Then they all shouted again, saying, "Not this man, but Barabbas!" Now Barabbas was a robber.

chokri: Pütü dopü kephomalü pünü thi kebaceri Jihova thümako zü kemezhe keto kadayi ta.
english: choosing rather to share ill treatment with God's people, than to enjoy the pleasures of sin for a time;

chokri: Vele Paul semeto de poti, ntho nmethi va hite, hako metü hice bazo.
english: But Paul cried with a loud voice, saying, "Don't harm yourself, for we are all here!"

chokri: Kekrelamori I mhace kejo hu thiva sakeshü thita süze I sata sheri mumo, vele mhace uko amejo keba ngoyi moze, thüma püri akhapü uko tsü vaho, I Caesar ce choyo.
english: For if I have done wrong, and have committed anything worthy of death, I don't refuse to die; but if none of those things is true that they accuse me of, no one can give me up to them. I appeal to Caesar!"

chokri: Süsa akepo, ukophe mesü vame de retu tateme? Mole, vele uko phe kemesü yola Judah kemokopo kelakeyi ngoyi ketola zo, de ukopo uroku ketola.
english: I ask then, did they stumble that they might fall? May it never be! But by their fall salvation has come to the Gentiles, to provoke them to jealousy.

chokri: I nekoce posüto, pü, khüpo thimha sütoi; sizizosheri, thüma Nuo kevorice cejülü kemelü ba ngoyi tome?
english: I tell you that he will avenge them quickly. Nevertheless, when the Son of Man comes, will he find faith on the earth?"

chokri: Peter hitüce kemelüko dolü tapra talü thi bayo, pü ta Lydda lü kehüko kemelü kocevo.
english: It happened, as Peter went throughout all those parts, he came down also to the saints who lived at Lydda.

chokri: Süri puko po pheku püyi, eli bola küna süh hi nosü.
english: but to wear sandals, and not put on two tunics.

chokri: Mu Pu müthaküyiko ce pheri tice thüma krode püh puko hu püba mu lüsiküsekoe püko züh kümüli küba ngoyi.
english: Coming to the disciples, he saw a great multitude around them, and scribes questioning them.

chokri: Pü Kemesa Rüpü züta de kereshücelü lüri nuranu Jisu krüneko püzü kereshücelü vori; thezho thopü kemetako thipü püyo sü ketola.
english: He came in the Spirit into the temple. When the parents brought in the child, Jesus, that they might do concerning him according to the custom of the law,

chokri: Mi neko ngometsüyo tiko thejo kepütho, side mi krolü neko hu kevako, neko meshü, nza cüpü thüma kesuthomithi, kekrelamori thümanuo la.
english: Blessed are you when men shall hate you, and when they shall exclude and mock you, and throw out your name as evil, for the Son of Man's sake.

chokri: I thüma celü therho ngoyimo.
english: I don't receive glory from men.

chokri: Uko uyi kürühmi küthoko, mu uko ropü lü Kemenupü rüshüyo, mu Khrista Jisu yolü unü tayo, uthi yolü küthiko mülü ta mo.
english: For we are the circumcision, who worship God in the Spirit, and rejoice in Christ Jesus, and have no confidence in the flesh;

chokri: Atho künyodzü küdopüh pota zori nieko sügüsühüyi te; nieko sühüyi yo.
english: I wish that you would bear with me in a little foolishness, but indeed you do bear with me.

chokri: Kharü kemerülü talü ketola thehe thite, I nce posüto, thüma kekro sülü lü keto thehe thizoto vele lüyi ho tato.
english: "Strive to enter in by the narrow door, for many, I tell you, will seek to enter in, and will not be able.

chokri: Mu Pu sükoce, I alü kümüzhe vo sata to bate, neko hice ba die khü bayite; zita.
english: He said to them, "My soul is exceedingly sorrowful, even to death. Stay here, and watch."

chokri: Tsüdoce n celümi pü Elizabeth pü pethi züde nune pü bate, pü nune tekhri shurü bate, nudipü le ketao sü.
english: Behold, Elizabeth, your relative, also has conceived a son in her old age; and this is the sixth month with her who was called barren.

chokri: Süsari u Kümünupüh yozo, sülize u Kümünupüh mu thüma dolü kütha ripuzo puno thüma thiküta Khrista zo.
english: For there is one God, and one mediator between God and men, the man Christ Jesus,

chokri: Süsa Pu ta Pu sadzikoce vori die puko yisü, neko tsüe züh mo rülüyite, Yhie, pütüo vorite, mo mi thümanuo tüpüh küphomako belü süva to bate.
english: Then he came to his disciples, and said to them, "Sleep on now, and take your rest. Behold, the hour is at hand, and the Son of Man is betrayed into the hands of sinners.

chokri: Vele uthi upho medolü menu keyi nuneko tsühi Rüpülü nuko methi meni kebako.
english: But as then, he who was born according to the flesh persecuted him who was born according to the Spirit, so also it is now.

chokri: Hei tsüo va hi nieko cie votoleno kürüde kütsü va süh-o taho. Mu I nieko müzhie thiho, kükrelamole I nieko mha phuzü mo nieko phuzü tsüzo; ununie po ukrünie ve müdo mole ukrünie po ununie ve müdoyo tsüla.
english: Behold, this is the third time I am ready to come to you, and I will not be a burden to you; for I seek not your possessions, but you. For the children ought not to save up for the parents, but the parents for the children.

chokri: Sülize Pu tüzaphe die tüprü cejü zürüh pü die; thiyive to lize bavüdo süo püh Pu thürü va no die sho bata.
english: He went forward a little, and fell on the ground, and prayed that, if it were possible, the hour might pass away from him.

chokri: Pü khonu süo keshüpü melü süva mu mhapüri pü methi mota.
english: However he shook off the creature into the fire, and wasn't harmed.

chokri: Kehopüri ala mengata lize mori ajükola sheri, thümanuo zapozale thide Püpo mu tüyochoyiko zü kiri tinha püri (sheri) püzapo menga tato.
english: For whoever will be ashamed of me and of my words, of him will the Son of Man be ashamed, when he comes in his glory, and the glory of the Father, and of the holy angels.

chokri: Vele thenopü pünü kuto ceyo mode pülebi bata lize, akelüce, vele alü kelü ce Niepoo rüpü azüta.
english: But she is happier if she stays as she is, in my judgment, and I think that I also have God's Spirit.

chokri: Süze puko mhürho küyice, Jisu libi sa mipühri ba sa mota.
english: Lifting up their eyes, they saw no one, except Jesus alone.

chokri: I po sühla yo, mipühri po apüh künyomi le lühi, mhanuü sitsüpüh thiri künyomi püh thino a züyi, sino a po kümüha zayi.
english: I say again, let no one think me foolish. But if so, yet receive me as foolish, that I also may boast a little.

chokri: Kehopüri ayo use zhüyi kemomi rhodü vato, uco kehopüri use zhü keyimi pü ketso süyo side püpo use zhü shuyi ketola.
english: Every branch in me that doesn't bear fruit, he takes away. Every branch that bears fruit, he prunes, that it may bear more fruit.

chokri: Vele thopü kemeta umhüpü ngo kemo, mori uni khipü reni kemomori thüma melülü lü kemo Jihova kesüpü metate pü khrüyo kezhoko la.
english: But as it is written, "Things which an eye didn't see, and an ear didn't hear, Which didn't enter into the heart of man, These God has prepared for those who love him."

chokri: Thüma kekro vori kenguyita, rüna kolü ta Jisu cevori, pü jüve khi ukoce posü
english: When a great multitude came together, and people from every city were coming to him, he spoke by a parable.

chokri: Tüyochoyimi thünako dolü mipü ace pheri de pü he lü tüsa 7 pü ta süko tüsa thülako pü ace poti, hice vorite, I zhosapü tha n meka sütomo, tekonu cemi.
english: One of the seven angels who had the seven bowls, who were loaded with the seven last plagues came, and he spoke with me, saying, "Come here. I will show you the wife, the Lamb's bride."

chokri: Mo süko mhakhreko lüno pari die Pu rhühlasü kütasa rüna kümüsaolü vo die thüma kükro mhüngo thita,
english: and coming out of the tombs after his resurrection, they entered into the holy city and appeared to many.

chokri: U Kümünupüh ukülaküyio mu Jisu Khrista ukümüri küneo yolü chi mu küdaküyi Paul no thopüh
english: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus according to the commandment of God our Savior, and Christ Jesus our hope;

chokri: Jisu chota keba peba, Pesüte, Jihova Konuo hi.
english: and he looked at Jesus as he walked, and said, "Behold, the Lamb of God!"

chokri: Pütho pülü lüti, I kedipü thita, kekrelamori amhako kengu yi keto thethi basa mote.
english: He reasoned within himself, saying, 'What will I do, because I don't have room to store my crops?'

chokri: Süpi sheri I nekopo thisü kenyü sü, asü salü nekopo mhahiko rekrazo tanyü.
english: Yes, I will make every effort that you may always be able to remember these things even after my departure.

chokri: Thüma kekrofü bi tsüpü I se, jü kekro fü bi, tüsüfü kezhopü bi, pode, Haleluya; Niepo Jihova keku metü püzhü tsüo kedethite.
english: I heard something like the voice of a great multitude, and like the voice of many waters, and like the voice of mighty thunders, saying, "Hallelujah! For the Lord our God, the Almighty, reigns!

chokri: Non kütsako ubekha n yolü küsüce sadzüküse dzüla Rüpü mhaphrü kha n phrüküvayo sün mhathi mo ba tahite.
english: Don't neglect the gift that is in you, which was given to you by prophecy, with the laying on of the hands of the elders.

chokri: U püzü kükrothoyo küti poyo de küzülü tayo lizo, u müdabate, mu küthoo thiyiyo mo.
english: If we say that we have fellowship with him and walk in the darkness, we lie, and don't tell the truth.
