chokri: Mu uko cejülü kehü hübi, uko sheri tülü kehüko hü thipü to.
english: As we have borne the image of those made of dust, let's also bear the image of the heavenly.

chokri: Kekrelamori thüma metü celü akekha püri bamozo sheri I athipü metüko thekümi thi tazo, sizi lize pra meve sayi ketola.
english: For though I was free from all, I brought myself under bondage to all, that I might gain the more.

chokri: Bavüdo sü vo ketasa, pücemi sübi ketako semode tavori.
english: About three hours later, his wife, not knowing what had happened, came in.

chokri: Caiman nu, Arphazad nu, sem nu, Noe nu, Lamech nu,
english: the son of Cainan, the son of Arphaxad, the son of Shem, the son of Noah, the son of Lamech,

chokri: Kemesa Rüpü zasi thaka kha kesü kemesatho chode thipü mesemengo sümo zolu, kereshüce kerao balu tithe;
english: The Holy Spirit is indicating this, that the way into the Holy Place wasn't yet revealed while the first tabernacle was still standing;

chokri: Süsa Jisu Pu müthaküyi kürikünako ci püh Puce süyi die, puko po müsakümo rüpüko huyi küve, küthi künyi mo küsü kümüza kükrekre ti mütü thi küsührhoyi küve küku püh puko prü sü.
english: He called to himself his twelve disciples, and gave them authority over unclean spirits, to cast them out, and to heal every disease and every sickness.

chokri: kekrelamori thenyelü mipü khasü keva mesü.
english: Now he had to release one prisoner to them at the feast.

chokri: Vele tsüno süko mese süte, m sajukeseko popü kemetako süculü keta Jihova kha kesüjüko; shuye metüpo kemelülü jüzü thi keyi.
english: But now is made manifest, and by the scriptures of the prophets, according to the commandment of the everlasting God, made known to all nations for the obedience of faith:

chokri: Hitülü Jisu tüpü kebako pü krünyü m u pü vüta.
english: The men who held Jesus mocked him and beat him.

chokri: Mo thüma kühopühri mhapüh nari ayo jotayo kümomi yheve tho.
english: Blessed is he who finds no occasion for stumbling in me."

chokri: pü uko metüce poti, mhace thüma humi asamejito lize, pütho pü mela va moze su, pü Cross (n phe medü) pü asameji mozesu.
english: He said to all, "If anyone desires to come after me, let him deny himself, take up his cross, and follow me.

chokri: Mu mhace neko Khrista zhüta lize neko Abraham tsa (si) kote, mu pü kelü ri tazo püpo keta jülü.
english: If you are Christ's, then you are Abraham's seed and heirs according to promise.

chokri: Pü jüve pü ukoce poti, mhücemipü mhücemi chothayi veme? Uni kenani retu tekhülü lüta motome?
english: He spoke a parable to them. "Can the blind guide the blind? Won't they both fall into a pit?

chokri: Uni ta nadekolü kevoce Jerusalem lü apostleko mu mehiko kehu kepo keyifü züyi node pü ukoce po vosü.
english: As they went on their way through the cities, they delivered the decrees to them to keep which had been ordained by the apostles and elders who were at Jerusalem.

chokri: Mhasüko metü pi kevaphi ti kekhrü, phakesapü vetsü tso keyi.
english: Above all these things, walk in love, which is the bond of perfection.

chokri: Sidie uko ki bayi die mhati kübace, Jisue sü, I nekoce potü süto, neko dolü mipüh a züh mhati kübao atü süto, zita.
english: As they sat and were eating, Jesus said, "Most assuredly I tell you, one of you will betray me -- he who eats with me."

chokri: Süsa Joseph pu küzüh lüno co süri die Nyiepoo shoyimi puce po küsü bi die pu cemi zühyita.
english: Joseph arose from his sleep, and did as the angel of the Lord commanded him, and took his wife to himself;

chokri: Ala medo kephi sü upho uthi neko mela va kemo, mori lümo tamo, vele akhipü tüyo jüyimi pü bi, Jihova celü kevori, Khrista Jisu celü. (Galatiami thezho kezülü thejo medi keva).
english: That which was a temptation to you in my flesh, you didn't despise nor reject; but you received me as an angel of God, even as Christ Jesus.

chokri: Pü rekremiko cüpü puce süyi de poti, Kezhomiko, neko seba uko cene ngo keyi mhatho hiola.
english: whom he gathered together, with the workmen of like occupation, and said, "Sirs, you know that by this business we have our wealth.

chokri: Sülebi mori michotha kethimi kemelü kevemi ziti mipo ngoti mesü.
english: Here, moreover, it is required of stewards, that they be found faithful.

chokri: Pu puko yisü; küsho mu kümvo lüno zo kümosa mha hipühi prayi yomo, zita.
english: He said to them, "This kind can come out by nothing, except by prayer and fasting."

chokri: Makro tavo pü jüsünyüta, kekrelamori mhakeve püyo prade süko metü thi kesürho sü ketola.
english: All the multitude sought to touch him, for power came out from him and healed them all.

chokri: Hako tekhri sü sa tavo cejü rethi tsokemo pülü voyi Alexandria ru nube za Castor mu Pollux thopü meta.
english: After three months, we set sail in a ship of Alexandria which had wintered in the island, whose sign was "The Twin Brothers."

chokri: Jacob jüfü süce ba. Jisu revü ho tata, süla jüfü khüyo ba; süce keba shurü (baro) ta.
english: Jacob's well was there. Jesus therefore, being tired from his journey, sat down by the well. It was about the sixth hour.

chokri: Kekrelamori akepoko atho amedo lamo, vele a Po aketsü kesüo, pü khapü atsü kesü, I po kesü mesüleno.
english: For I spoke not from myself, but the Father who sent me, he gave me a commandment, what I should say, and what I should speak.

chokri: Jükekro, thefü kekro cejü ba, süko püri uco kedi kethi bamo.
english: There are, it may be, so many kinds of sounds in the world, and none of them is without meaning.

chokri: Kekrelamori micemi neko neko se bame neko nopu neko kelayi keto, mori minopu neko neko cemi neko kelayi keto se bame?
english: For how do you know, wife, whether you will save your husband? Or how do you know, husband, whether you will save your wife?

chokri: Südziyi lizo ne na veto mu ne cedzü lü rhüh choyi to.
english: "that it may be well with you, and you may live long on the earth."

chokri: Süla thüma kühopühri Khrista yo bata tsüsa püh kühü küsa te, mha küvüko dite mu hie mütü küsatsüte.
english: Therefore if anyone is in Christ, he is a new creation. The old things have passed away. Behold, all things have become new.

chokri: Sücesü mi nekoce Khristao lice ba mori hice ba ziri; mülü hite.
english: "Then if any man tells you, 'Behold, here is the Christ,' or, 'There,' don't believe it.

chokri: I thüpu no kümühayo küzho hio Nyepoo zhopo mono künyomi bi no poyo.
english: That which I speak, I don't speak according to the Lord, but as in foolishness, in this confidence of boasting.

chokri: I nekoce potü süto, thüma kühopühri natsimi bi zo die Poo küde yiyi mo lize sülü lüyi kündizo.
english: Most assuredly I tell you, whoever will not receive the Kingdom of God like a little child, he will in no way enter into it."

chokri: Pü mohor dao phrü süri khonu dao mha kepo I se, “vori pete.”
english: When he opened the fourth seal, I heard the fourth living creature saying, "Come and see!"

chokri: Süsa Pu süko zü küla die, I nekoce potü süto, nekoe künyitho hiko yori thisü mo küta sü a yo ri thisü mota zo, zita to.
english: "Then he will answer them, saying, 'Most assuredly I tell you, inasmuch as you didn't do it to one of the least of these, you didn't do it to me.'

chokri: Vele cüyi ketako, Jew miko sheri mu Greek miko sheri kenani Khrista hi Jihova kekuo zo, mu Jihova mhaselü jü.
english: but to those who are called, both Jews and Greeks, Christ is the power of God and the wisdom of God.

chokri: Süna thüno süpü püce mha kühopüh sho zoshi pu küshoo püh pu prü toli zi die pu zü khasü va.
english: Whereupon he promised with an oath to give her whatever she should ask.

chokri: Süsa Jisu kürüsucelü mi mütha kübace Pu lasü, dibi die lüsiküseko Khrista David nuo lizi yo la?
english: Jesus responded, as he taught in the temple, "How is it that the scribes say that the Christ is the son of David?

chokri: Tümu cejüni dolü choyi kethi süo mipü zomo, vele Jihova sü pü lebizo.
english: Now a mediator is not between one, but God is one.

chokri: Isaiah ri pokesü, Jesse meyo kevoripü Judah kemoko kekhato, Judahmi kemoko pümelüto.
english: Again, Isaiah says, "There will be the root of Jesse, He who arises to rule over the Gentiles; On him will the Gentiles hope."

chokri: Ha niece vo kütsüce ta chuhküzü vori mo, mu ha Khrista dzüyiküveo püh niece vo küratho thizo.
english: For we don't stretch ourselves too much, as though we didn't reach to you. For we came even as far as to you with the Gospel of Christ,

chokri: Süyolü nüko vapüh cedzü-o zhozüh tükhralü küta küku küde nuko zhozüh mu ropü tsüdo dzüzühthiyimo küta nuneko yolü mhathi kütayolülhüta.
english: in which you once walked according to the course of this world, according to the prince of the powers of the air, the spirit who now works in the children of disobedience;

chokri: Süna thülü küde küyi se-o po rüthi pariyite.
english: Therefore bring forth fruit worthy of repentance!

chokri: Kephoma kekrelamori a melümo ketala.
english: about sin, because they don't believe in me;

chokri: Dipüo poreyi kuta? Nkephomava ntsüvaho siti me? Mori tasüte de chotayi tate, süni dipüo poreyi ku?
english: Which is easier to say, 'Your sins are forgiven you;' or to say, 'Arise and walk?'

chokri: Tükhro thüma püri dita, a jüyoridi, m ajü khroridi.
english: No one in heaven above, or on the earth, or under the earth, was able to open the book, or to look in it.

chokri: Paul Sila kedayi de tata, kemelükro Niepoo ngokemezhe lü uni ketsüsüva.
english: but Paul chose Silas, and went out, being commended by the brothers to the grace of God.

chokri: Neko hibi cüyi tazo, kekrelamori Khrista sheri uko la kemezhe sü, thaka thi uka sü, side nekopo pü phecelü tayi ketola.
english: For to this you were called, because Christ also suffered for us, leaving you an example, that you should follow his steps,

chokri: Akehü azho rele akhresace ashuyelü I Jerusalem lü hü ketaceri, Jews miko metü seba.
english: "Indeed, all the Jews know my way of life from my youth up, which was from the beginning among my own nation and at Jerusalem;

chokri: Sücesü Phariseeko mo Sadduceeko vori die pü po tüyono zasi püh thipüh püko ka no die pü müdephi ta.
english: The Pharisees and Sadducees came, and testing him, asked him to show them a sign from heaven.

chokri: Uko sazüjürako azü kebako, thopü Galatiamiko ce kesü.
english: and all the brothers who are with me, to the assemblies of Galatia:

chokri: Süsa Pilate-e Pu satü ta me moshi küti se küto la, kra pi küzhoo ci sü die pu sa küta tü puce kütso.
english: Pilate marveled if he were already dead; and summoning the centurion, he asked him whether he had been dead long.

chokri: Hisa non dzü libi krazo mode khubuzü küdopüh püh sade krayite kükrelamoli non tsükünu nva thitayo kütila.
english: Be no longer a drinker of water only, but use a little wine for your stomach's sake and your frequent infirmities.

chokri: Süla no u nepo zhopüo küthi ceco ri mu pu jü thiküto püh dzüyi küve la kümüzhe zoyi.
english: Therefore don't be ashamed of the testimony of our Lord, nor of me his prisoner; but endure hardship for the Gospel according to the power of God,

chokri: Süsa Jisu rüna nadekolü mo natsühkolü whi die puko synagogueko lü mi mütha mo tüyoküde züyiküve po püh mice sü, süze thüma dolü küthi künyi lünyiko thi küsührho vota.
english: Jesus went about all the cities and the villages, teaching in their synagogues, and preaching the Gospel of the Kingdom, and healing every disease and every sickness among the people.

chokri: Süzüno küthoo mülü moli küthokümo-o lü unü küta khüko müjo vato.
english: that they all might be judged who didn't believe the truth, but had pleasure in unrighteousness.

chokri: Jihova cesücene süko zapozale kethi ketekhri zhü khi Gentile miko mese sü bate, Khrista neko yo ketao, zapozale kemeri.
english: to whom God was pleased to make known what are the riches of the glory of this mystery among the Gentiles, which is Christ in you, the hope of glory;

chokri: U dzütho mo zori Püe dzütho süh bazo, kükrelamori Püe Pütho Pdzü molen potyi hozo küzüla; dzü hiko küthozo.
english: If we are faithless, He remains faithful. He can't deny himself.
